name: csp-validation
description: Playwright suite that validates the Content-Security-Policy enforced on MyLS (my.legitscript.com) and reports CSP violations for legitimate resources (LS-34808, AC4).

scripts.test:bg: mkdir -p output && nohup playwright test --project=myls > output/run.log 2>&1 & echo "CSP sweep running in background (PID $!). Follow with: tail -f output/run.log"
